workspace.collaboration.gigot.info: GiGot service integration for team-shared Formidable workspaces.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.clone.info: Fetch the configured GiGot repository into the active context folder. Clone is a merge-aware pull (server deletes apply locally, local-only files survive). Re-clone first wipes managed paths (templates/, storage/, README.md, .gitignore, the sync ledger) and then fetches a fresh copy. Use it when you want to discard local edits and re-key to the server's HEAD.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.clone.toke: Subscription bearer for this GiGot server. Leave blank to use the bearer already saved for this profile and repository.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.clone.save: Persists the bearer in the OS keychain so future sync ops don't re-prompt. Turn off to run a one-shot Clone without altering the saved bearer.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.clone.bear: No bearer saved yet for {0} → {1}. Enter one above to clone.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.clone.dirt: {0} local file(s) differ from the server. Clone is a merge-aware pull and will overwrite those differences with the server's content. Push or commit first if you want to keep them.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.clone.refu: A bearer is already saved for this profile/repo. Turn on 'Save bearer for sync' to update it, or clear the token field to use the saved one.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.clone.not_: Configure Context Directory, GiGot Base URL, and Repository on Current Service before cloning.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.clone.recl: Every gigot-managed path under {0} (templates/, storage/, README.md, .gitignore, .formidable/sync.json) will be deleted and re-fetched from the server. Local-only edits in managed paths will be LOST. Other files in the context folder are preserved.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.sync.info: Push local changes to the GiGot server and pull remote updates into the active context folder. Pending lists are computed against the local sync ledger.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.sync.not_c: Configure Context Directory, GiGot Base URL, and Repository on Current Service before syncing.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.sync.no_le: No local sync record. Clone the repository first under Clone Repository.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.sync.clean: Everything is in sync locally. No pending changes.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.sync.remot: Remote moved (HEAD {0}). Pull to catch up.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.sync.messa: Describe what changed! It's required before a Push or Sync.
Already up to date with remote. Nothing to pull.
Push or commit local changes before pulling. A Pull would overwrite them.
Already in sync - nothing to push.
workspace.collaboration.gigot.sync.mirro: Push or commit local changes first. Mirrors would carry the stale remote state.
Every mirror is already in sync with the remote. Nothing to push.
Pending local changes. Open Repository Sync to enter a commit message before pushing.
